svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="statemachine-hierarchy" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-521" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="多状态机层级与协同：策略层任务 FSM 唯一定阶段，控制层与感知层为子机制" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="760" x="130" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=28;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#274d20;" value="策略层（唯一权威状态机）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="760" x="130" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="任务 FSM（mission_manager · 五态）
SEARCH → LOCK → TRACK → REACQUIRE_REGION（＋ EMERGENCY 终态）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="450" x="175" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="10" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#4a7a2f;" value="决策：当前阶段 ＋ 速度因子 ＋ 制导源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="450" x="175" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=28;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3a5f;" value="控制层（受策略层调度的子机制）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="760" x="130" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="探测爆发子 FSM（probe_burst · 仅 TRACK 内使能）
IDLE → BURST → RECOVER → COOLDOWN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="330" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="20" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="控制器内子模式（无名）
翻腿 · 解耦横向 · 磁穿越探测 · 前视追踪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="330" x="410" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="20" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#3a5f8f;" value="输出：航向 / 速度指令（几何执行，不决定阶段）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="680" x="60" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=28;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6b5610;" value="感知层（提供输入，不直接发航向）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="760" x="130" y="364" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="局部路径状态（local_path）
COLLECTING · LINE · CURVE · REACQUIRE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="330" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="重捕区选择（ObservableRegionSelector）
有界候选 ＋ 打分" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="330" x="410" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" parent="30" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#9c6a00;" value="输出：中心线几何 / 置信度 / 重捕区可用性 → PerceptionState" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="680" x="60" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.4;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.6;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="10" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="88" y="412" /> <mxPoint x="88" y="118" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.6;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.4;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="20" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="912" y="118" /> <mxPoint x="912" y="248" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=10;fontColor=#6f4f86;dashed=1;" target="21" value="TRACK 态使能"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="178" /> <mxPoint x="355" y="178" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1.3;dashed=1;" target="32" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="958" y="99" /> <mxPoint x="958" y="410" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="110" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9c6a00;" value="① 感知输入
（上行）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="126" x="2" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="111" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#4a7a2f;" value="② 阶段调度
（下行）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="848" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="112" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#6f4f86;" value="REACQUIRE
态联动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="100" x="892" y="424" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;fontColor=#666666;spacingLeft=8;" value="图注：策略层任务 FSM 是唯一决定「当前处于哪个阶段」的权威状态机；控制层的探测爆发子 FSM 与控制器内子模式只在被授权阶段执行几何动作，感知层的局部路径状态与重捕区选择仅向上提供观测输入，二者均不直接决定任务阶段。① 上行：感知输入（几何＋置信度＋重捕区就绪）汇入策略层；② 下行：策略层按阶段调度控制层子机制。紫色虚线为典型纵向配合：TRACK 态使能探测爆发、REACQUIRE_REGION 态联动重捕区选择器。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="820" x="130" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 14px; margin-left: 508px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 多状态机层级与协同：策略层任务 FSM 唯一定阶段，控制层与感知层为子机制

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 94px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 95px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #274d20;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#274d20, #9ebf98); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 策略层（唯一权威状态机）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 81px; margin-left: 304px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
任务 FSM（mission_manager · 五态）
SEARCH → LOCK → TRACK → REACQUIRE_REGION（＋ EMERGENCY 终态）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 118px; margin-left: 528px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4a7a2f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#4a7a2f, #759f5e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 决策：当前阶段 ＋ 速度因子 ＋ 制导源

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 242px; margin-left: 83px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f3a5f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f3a5f, #a9c0e0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 控制层（受策略层调度的子机制）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 228px; margin-left: 189px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
探测爆发子 FSM（probe_burst · 仅 TRACK 内使能）
IDLE → BURST → RECOVER → COOLDOWN

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 228px; margin-left: 539px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
控制器内子模式（无名）
翻腿 · 解耦横向 · 磁穿越探测 · 前视追踪

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 276px; margin-left: 528px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #3a5f8f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3a5f8f, #83a3cc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 输出：航向 / 速度指令（几何执行，不决定阶段）

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 406px; margin-left: 83px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6b5610;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b5610, #b6a468); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 感知层（提供输入，不直接发航向）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 392px; margin-left: 189px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
局部路径状态（local_path）
COLLECTING · LINE · CURVE · REACQUIRE

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 392px; margin-left: 539px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
重捕区选择（ObservableRegionSelector）
有界候选 ＋ 打分

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 440px; margin-left: 528px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9c6a00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9c6a00, #b88d32); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 输出：中心线几何 / 置信度 / 重捕区可用性 → PerceptionState

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));
fill: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 402px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6f4f86; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6f4f86, #b297c6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 91px; margin-left: 63px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9c6a00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9c6a00, #b88d32); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 159px; margin-left: 906px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4a7a2f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#4a7a2f, #759f5e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 423px; margin-left: 940px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6f4f86;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6f4f86, #b297c6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 514px; margin-left: 138px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 图注：策略层任务 FSM 是唯一决定「当前处于哪个阶段」的权威状态机；控制层的探测爆发子 FSM 与控制器内子模式只在被授权阶段执行几何动作，感知层的局部路径状态与重捕区选择仅向上提供观测输入，二者均不直接决定任务阶段。① 上行：感知输入（几何＋置信度＋重捕区就绪）汇入策略层；② 下行：策略层按阶段调度控制层子机制。紫色虚线为典型纵向配合：TRACK 态使能探测爆发、REACQUIRE_REGION 态联动重捕区选择器。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
